Name: ShopLineupParam
Description:
Defines trades available in shops.
Available trades in a given shop are determined by a range defined in ESD and by game flags.
Items sold for less than their sell price will not appear in shops.
Material costs may not be shown in shop variants.

Fields.Name: Reference ID
Fields.Description: ID of the equipment for sale

Fields.Name: Sell Price Overwrite
Fields.Description: Selling price to overwrite (-1: Do not overwrite)

Fields.Name: Required Material ID
Fields.Description: Material ID required for purchase (-1: None)

Fields.Name: Quantity - Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Event flag value that holds the number

Fields.Name: Currency Type
Fields.Description: Price type. Applies only when overwriting the selling price

Fields.Name: Amount on Purchase
Fields.Description: Number of sets sold. Number of pieces you can get with one purchase (default: 1)

Fields.Name: Price Addition
Fields.Description: Correction (addition) to the selling price of equipment. Equipment para selling price x magnification + addition

Fields.Name: Price Multiplier
Fields.Description: Correction (magnification) to the selling price of equipment. Equipment para selling price x magnification + addition

Fields.Name: Name - Text ID
Fields.Description: Menu display_text ID (-1: do not overwrite)

Fields.Name: Menu Title - Text ID
Fields.Description: Text ID of the shop menu title (-1: Do not overwrite). This value of the first para found in the para ID range passed when launching the shop is referenced

Fields.Name: Menu Icon ID
Fields.Description: Shop menu icon ID (-1: Do not overwrite). This value of the first para found in the para ID range passed when launching the shop is referenced
